mapper.select: select count(1) from logistics_order where deleted = 0 and created_at >= current_date and created_at < date_add(current_date, interval 1 day) and customer_id = #{customerId}
select count(1) from logistics_order where deleted = 0 and status in ('COMPLETED', 'SIGNED', 'DELIVERED') and customer_id = #{customerId}
select count(1) from logistics_order where deleted = 0 and status = 'WAIT_DISPATCH' and customer_id = #{customerId}
select count(1) from logistics_order where deleted = 0 and status in ('PICKED', 'IN_TRANSIT') and customer_id = #{customerId}
select count(1) from logistics_exception where deleted = 0 and exception_status != 'CLOSED' and order_id in (select id from logistics_order where customer_id = #{customerId} and deleted = 0)

select coalesce(sum(payable_fee), 0) from logistics_fee where deleted = 0 and payment_status = 'PAID' and update_time >= date_format(current_date, '%Y-%m-01') and update_time < date_format(date_add(current_date, interval 1 month), '%Y-%m-01') and order_id in (select id from logistics_order where customer_id = #{customerId} and deleted = 0)

select coalesce(sum(payable_fee), 0) from logistics_fee where deleted = 0 and payment_status = 'PAID' and update_time >= date_format(date_sub(current_date, interval 1 month), '%Y-%m-01') and update_time < date_format(current_date, '%Y-%m-01') and order_id in (select id from logistics_order where customer_id = #{customerId} and deleted = 0)
select status, count(1) as total from logistics_order where deleted = 0 group by status order by status

select e.id, e.order_id as order_no, e.exception_type, e.exception_desc, e.exception_status, e.report_user, e.report_time from logistics_exception e where e.deleted = 0 and e.exception_status != 'CLOSED' and e.order_id in (select id from logistics_order where customer_id = #{customerId} and deleted = 0) order by e.report_time desc limit 10

select c.id, c.employee_id as employeeId, c.contract_no as contractNo, date_format(c.end_date, '%Y-%m-%d') as endDate from hr_contract c where c.deleted = 0 and c.contract_status = 1 and c.end_date is not null and c.end_date between current_date and date_add(current_date, interval #{days} day)

select count(1) from logistics_order where deleted = 0 and created_at >= date_format(date_sub(current_date, interval 1 month), '%Y-%m-01') and created_at < date_format(current_date, '%Y-%m-01') and customer_id = #{customerId}

select count(1) from logistics_exception where deleted = 0 and report_time >= date_format(date_sub(current_date, interval 1 month), '%Y-%m-01') and report_time < date_format(current_date, '%Y-%m-01') and order_id in (select id from logistics_order where customer_id = #{customerId} and deleted = 0)
select count(1) from sys_uploaded_file where deleted = 0
